title: Build a Stylized To-Do List
description: A styled to-do list with four tasks, each containing a checkbox, a label, and a nested sub-item list with a link. The CSS demonstrates all five anchor link pseudo-classes — link, visited, hover, focus, and active — each with a distinct color or outline, along with a card-style container, rounded list items, and a square sub-item marker.
objectives: Style anchor elements using :link, :visited, :hover, :focus, and :active pseudo-classes
Add a visible outline on :focus for keyboard accessibility
Use nested ul elements with a custom list-style-type
Associate checkbox inputs with labels using id and for
Link an external stylesheet and apply container and list styles

files.name: index.html
